title: McAlive:LeafyLeaves
description: This pack makes leaves more leafy while trying to keep vanilla style
body:
This pack makes leaves randomly bushy while making the bushes different on every leaf (mangrove not included caused lot of lag) **may cause peformance issues [cull-less-leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves) rcommended**

### This pack has three versions:
**Normal**-Just bushy leaves!

**Animated**-this version was made to fit [McAlive:Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mcaliveleaves)

**Height**-animation is based on height also made to fit [McAlive:Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mcaliveleaves)
